title: Ripple wants AI agents to pay in XRP and RLUSD. The market is still mostly USDC
summary: Ripple launched the XRPL AI Starter Kit to help developers build AI agents that pay using XRP and RLUSD. Early x402 activity has clustered on Base and Solana, but Ripple is betting XRPL's speed, low fees, and RLUSD can win a piece of that flow.
body:
Ripple has launched the XRPL AI Starter Kit, a set of tools designed to help developers build AI agents that can make payments using XRP and RLUSD. This move is part of Ripple's strategy to capture a share of the growing AI-driven financial transactions market.

Early activity in AI agent payments using the x402 protocol has largely been concentrated on blockchains like Base and Solana, with most payments being made in USDC. Ripple believes that the XRP Ledger's (XRPL) speed and low transaction fees, combined with the stability of RLUSD, will make it an attractive alternative for developers.

For everyday users, this development could mean more options for seamless, low-cost transactions in AI-driven applications. If Ripple's vision succeeds, users might see faster and cheaper payment solutions in various AI services, from automated financial advisors to smart contract-based services.

Developers and businesses interested in integrating AI agent payments should keep an eye on Ripple's XRPL AI Starter Kit. As the market evolves, the adoption of XRP and RLUSD could grow, potentially offering more competitive alternatives to USDC-dominated platforms. Watch for updates on developer adoption and new use cases emerging from this initiative.

Ripple's XRPL AI Starter Kit offers tools for developers to build AI agents that use XRP and RLUSD for payments. They hope speed, low fees, and RLUSD will win over developers.

Developers should check out Ripple's XRPL AI Starter Kit. If adoption grows, users could see faster, cheaper AI-driven payment solutions. Read more → https://www.cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-06-13-ripple-pushes-for-ai-payments-in-xrp-and-rlusd-competes-with-usdc
standaloneTweet: Ripple is pushing for AI agents to use XRP and RLUSD for payments via the x402 protocol, aiming to compete with USDC's dominance on Base and Solana. Could this mean faster, cheaper AI transactions for you?
